defaultComboState.description: If all 3 hits land on 3 different targets, gain Dance Momentum (4s): next single-target skill also hits 1 adjacent enemy for 50% of its damage.

mechanics: Kill Redirect (T1a — if a hit kills its target, next hit redirects to a new enemy with bonus damage)
Slaughter State (T2 notable — 3 different kills in short window triggers burst state)
Reaper's Dance (T6 notable — killing all 3 targets in one cast triggers massive AoE)
nonTracked: +X% crit per unique target hit — T3 conditional, no tracking
Slaughter state duration extension — T4b support, enhances tracked state

comboModifications.description: Dance Momentum's splash damage increased from 50% to 75% and the splashed hit can crit.

nodes.name: Kill Redirect
nodes.description: If a Blade Dance hit kills its target, the next hit in the cast retargets to a new enemy and gains +30% damage.
nodes.rank2: +45% damage on redirected hits. Redirected hits also gain +10% crit chance.
nodes.designNotes: Unique to sequential-target: if hit 1 kills mob 1, hit 2 finds a NEW mob 2 instead of whiffing. Creates kill-chain momentum within a single cast. Can't exist on Stab (single hit).

nodes.name: Opportunistic Strikes
nodes.description: +8% crit chance for each unique target hit by Blade Dance in the current cast. (3 targets = +24% crit on the last hit).
nodes.rank2: +12% per unique target (+36% on last hit). Crits on the 3rd target apply Exposed.
nodes.designNotes: Crit scaling based on TARGET DIVERSITY. More targets = more crit. Opposite of Stab's consecutive-hit-on-same-target pattern. Rank 2 creating Exposed on 3rd target crit is a unique way to set up combos — the LAST mob hit gets marked.

nodes.name: Slaughter Dance
nodes.description: When Blade Dance kills 2+ targets in a single cast: enter Slaughter state (+25% damage, +20% crit chance for 4s). Killing 3 targets extends duration to 6s and adds +15% crit multiplier.
nodes.designNotes: Escalating proc based on KILLS IN CAST — unique to sequential AoE. Stab can only kill 1 per cast. Blade Dance can kill 2-3 if targets are low. Rewards finishing off wounded pack members. The 3-kill escalation is the dream scenario.

nodes.name: Target Selection
nodes.description: Blade Dance prioritizes the lowest-HP enemy for hit 1. If hit 1 kills, the kill redirect bonus (T1a) is more likely to trigger.
nodes.rank2: Also prioritizes 2nd lowest for hit 2. +3% weapon mastery.
nodes.designNotes: Smart targeting. Hitting low-HP enemies first maximizes kill redirects (T1a) and Slaughter Dance (T2) triggers. Changes the idle auto-behavior from 'random targeting' to 'execute-first targeting.' Unique to sequential-target skills.

nodes.name: Pack Hunter
nodes.description: +10% damage with Blade Dance per enemy in the current pack (max +40% at 4+ enemies).
nodes.rank2: +15% per enemy (max +60%). +3% weapon mastery.
nodes.designNotes: Pack-size scaling. More enemies = more damage. Worthless on boss (1 mob), strong on big packs. Natural fit for sequential AoE.

nodes.name: Finishing Dance
nodes.description: +20% crit chance against targets below 40% HP.
nodes.rank2: +30% crit chance. Kills during Blade Dance reduce its cooldown by 0.5s per kill.
nodes.designNotes: Execute helper. With Target Selection (T2b) hitting lowest HP first, this stacks well — hit the weakest, crit it, kill it, get CD back. Different from Stab's Exploit Opening (50% HP threshold, no CD interaction).

nodes.name: Sweeping Momentum
nodes.description: +15% damage on the next skill cast after Blade Dance if at least 2 targets were hit.
nodes.rank2: +25% damage. If 3 targets were hit, also gain +10% crit chance for next skill.
nodes.designNotes: Rotation flow — Blade Dance into another skill gets a damage bonus. Rewards using BD as an opener. Different from Stab's Lethal Rhythm (per-consecutive-hit ramp) because this is a one-shot per-cast bonus.

nodes.name: Triple Execution
nodes.description: When Blade Dance hits 3 different targets and at least 1 is below 30% HP: that low-HP target takes +50% damage from Blade Dance AND Dance Momentum's splash is increased to 75% (can crit). +5% weapon mastery.
nodes.designNotes: Gated on 3 unique targets + execute threshold. Combines sequential-target mechanic with execute. The Dance Momentum enhancement rewards using BD before a big single-target follow-up.

nodes.name: Slaughter Extension
nodes.description: While Slaughter state is active: +15% damage with all skills.
nodes.rank2: +25% damage. Each kill during Slaughter extends it by 1s (max +3s).
nodes.designNotes: Support for T2 Slaughter state. Global damage during the window. Rank 2's kill extension creates snowball — Slaughter → kill → extend → kill → extend.

nodes.name: Methodical Dancer
nodes.description: Blade Dance always hits 3 targets even if fewer than 3 enemies exist (remaining hits re-hit the same target). All hits gain +10% damage. +8% weapon mastery.
nodes.designNotes: Consistent choice. REMOVES the single-target penalty entirely — BD always fires 3 hits. On a boss, that's 3 × 30% = 90% WD + 10% = 99% WD total. Still less than Stab (100%) but close, and with 3 crit rolls. Makes BD viable everywhere, not just packs.

nodes.name: Dance of Death
nodes.description: Each Blade Dance kill during the cast adds +1 hit to the cast (kill mob 1 → hit 4 fires, kill mob 2 → hit 5 fires, etc.). Extra hits deal 30% WD each. If Blade Dance kills 0 targets, its cooldown is increased by 2s.
nodes.designNotes: Risky chain-kill fantasy. In a pack of 5, if BD keeps killing, it could fire 5+ hits in one cast. Against tanky mobs where nothing dies, you get punished with +2s CD. Feast or famine.

nodes.name: Reaper's Dance
nodes.description: When Blade Dance kills 3+ targets in a single cast: trigger Reaper's Dance — deal 200% of Blade Dance's fully-scaled damage as AoE to ALL remaining enemies. 12s internal cooldown. +5% weapon mastery.
nodes.designNotes: Triple-kill catastrophic proc. Incredibly hard to achieve (3 kills in one cast of a 30% WD skill) but devastatingly rewarding. With T1a Kill Redirect and T5B Dance of Death, the chain-kill path makes this reachable. Different from Stab's Death Mark (setup→consume) — this is a pure kill-chain explosion.

nodes.name: DANCE MACABRE
nodes.description: Blade Dance targets ALL enemies in the pack (becomes full AoE like Fan of Knives) but each hit deals only 15% WD. Reaper's Dance (T6) triggers on 2+ kills instead of 3+ but at 150% instead of 200%. -10% damage with all other skills.
nodes.tensionDescription: T6 (Reaper's Dance) requires 3 kills for 200% AoE. T7 lowers the gate to 2 kills but reduces the payoff to 150% AND makes each individual hit weaker (15% vs 30%). Also nerfs all OTHER skills by -10%. You're committing to BD as your primary AoE at the cost of everything else.
nodes.antiSynergyNotes: Methodical Dancer (T5A) — 'always fire 3 hits' is meaningless when BD hits ALL enemies anyway.
nodes.synergyNotes: Dance of Death (T5B) — extra hits per kill + all-target = maximum kill chain potential. Reaper's Dance (T6) — easier trigger (2 kills). Pack Hunter (T3a) — per-enemy damage scales with full pack targeting.

mechanics: Distributed Infection (T1a — ailments gain potency per unique target hit in cast)
Plague Link (T2 notable — hitting 3 targets links them, damage to one partially hits others)
Pandemic Dance (T6 notable — killing a linked target spreads ALL ailments to linked survivors)
nonTracked: +X% ailment potency per enemy in pack — T3 conditional, no tracking
Plague Link duration extension — T4b support, enhances tracked state

comboModifications.description: Dance Momentum replaced with Plague Spread: next skill's ailment also applies to 1 adjacent enemy at 50% potency.

nodes.name: Distributed Infection
nodes.description: Ailments applied by Blade Dance gain +10% potency for each unique target hit in the cast. (3 targets = each ailment at +30% potency).
nodes.rank2: +15% per unique target (+45% at 3 targets). +3% weapon mastery.
nodes.designNotes: Ailment potency scales with TARGET DIVERSITY. Hitting 3 different mobs makes each ailment 30-45% stronger. Unique to sequential-target — Stab's Plague T1a extends DURATION through consecutive hits instead. Completely different scaling axis.

nodes.name: Infectious Dance
nodes.description: If Blade Dance hits a target that already has an active ailment, the new ailment gains +15% duration.
nodes.rank2: +25% duration. If the existing ailment was applied by a DIFFERENT skill, also gain +10% potency.
nodes.designNotes: Rewards hitting already-ailmented targets. Rank 2's 'different skill' bonus encourages rotation: Stab poisons mob → Blade Dance hits same mob → stronger/longer ailment. Different from Stab's Toxic Momentum (per unique ailment TYPE).

nodes.name: Plague Link
nodes.description: When Blade Dance hits 3 different targets: link all 3 with Plague Link (5s). While linked, 15% of damage dealt to any linked target is also dealt to other linked targets. +8% ailment duration.
nodes.designNotes: Plague Link is a UNIQUE mechanic — damage sharing between linked targets. Only possible because Blade Dance hits 3 specific targets. Can't exist on Stab (single target) or Fan of Knives (all targets). The 15% share means focused damage on one linked target partially kills the others.

nodes.name: Contagious Steps
nodes.description: Ailments applied to linked targets (from Plague Link damage sharing) have +20% potency.
nodes.rank2: +35% potency. Shared damage also counts as a 'hit' for ailment application purposes (can apply new ailment stacks via sharing).
nodes.designNotes: Enhances Plague Link. Rank 2 is huge — shared damage applying ailments means one target's ailments naturally spread to linked targets through the damage sharing. Creates a self-reinforcing plague web.

nodes.name: Mass Infection
nodes.description: +8% ailment potency for Blade Dance per enemy in the current pack (max +32% at 4+).
nodes.rank2: +12% per enemy (max +48%). +3% weapon mastery.
nodes.designNotes: Pack-size ailment scaling. Bigger pack = stronger ailments. Mirrors Predator's Pack Hunter (damage) but for ailment potency.

nodes.name: Plague Spread
nodes.description: Dance Momentum replaced with Plague Spread (4s): next skill's ailment also applies to 1 adjacent enemy at 50% potency.
nodes.rank2: Spreads to 2 adjacent enemies at 60% potency.
nodes.designNotes: COMBO MODIFICATION. Instead of next skill splashing damage, it splashes AILMENTS. Blade Dance → Viper Strike = deep poison on front mob + weaker poison on 1-2 adjacent. Plague identity.

nodes.name: Lingering Links
nodes.description: Ailments on Plague-Linked targets last 20% longer.
nodes.rank2: 30% longer. Plague Link duration extended by 1s (6s total).
nodes.designNotes: Simple conditional enhancing the Plague Link mechanic. Longer ailments on linked targets = more shared damage = more spread.

nodes.name: Plague Web
nodes.description: When 3 Plague-Linked targets all have 3+ ailment stacks simultaneously: enter Plague Web state (5s). During Plague Web: Plague Link damage sharing increased from 15% to 30% and applies to ALL enemies in the pack (not just linked targets). 15s internal cooldown. +5% weapon mastery.
nodes.designNotes: State-shift when all 3 linked targets are deeply ailmented. The damage sharing becomes pack-wide at 30% — hitting ANY enemy partially hits ALL enemies. Unique to Blade Dance because only it creates the 3-target link.

nodes.name: Web Amplifier
nodes.description: While Plague Web is active: +15% ailment potency for all skills.
nodes.rank2: +25% ailment potency. Each ailment applied during Plague Web extends it by 0.3s (max +2s).
nodes.designNotes: Support for T4 Plague Web. Global ailment potency during the web window. Rank 2's per-ailment extension means fast-hitting skills keep the web alive longer.

nodes.name: Persistent Links
nodes.description: Plague Link persists until the linked targets die (no duration limit). Plague Link damage sharing increased to 20% baseline. +8% weapon mastery.
nodes.designNotes: Consistent choice. Permanent links = permanent shared damage. Once 3 targets are linked, they stay linked until dead. Reliable, always-on value for sustained fights.

nodes.name: Detonating Links
nodes.description: When a Plague-Linked target dies: detonate all its ailments as instant burst damage to the other linked targets (100% of remaining ailment damage). Plague Link is removed from all targets after detonation.
nodes.designNotes: Risky detonation. Killing one linked target dumps all its ailment damage into the other linked targets. High burst but removes the link — you must reapply. Feast-or-famine.

nodes.name: Pandemic Dance
nodes.description: When a Plague-Linked target dies: ALL of its ailments spread to the other linked targets at 100% remaining duration and potency. If the dead target had 5+ ailment stacks, also spreads to ALL non-linked enemies in the pack. +5% weapon mastery.
nodes.designNotes: Kill-chain ailment spread through links. Kill one heavily-stacked target → its ailments jump to linked targets (and whole pack at 5+ stacks). Different from Stab's Pandemic Cascade (spread on ANY kill) because this requires the Plague Link setup.

nodes.name: PLAGUE DANCER
nodes.description: Plague Link now links ALL enemies hit by Blade Dance (not just 3). Linked enemy ailments deal 3x effect. Blade Dance direct hit damage reduced by -30%. Non-linked enemies take -20% ailment damage from you.
nodes.tensionDescription: T6 (Pandemic Dance) spreads ailments from linked kills. T7 links ALL targets but heavily reduces direct damage and penalizes non-linked ailment damage. You MUST link targets first (via Blade Dance cast) for your ailments to work at full power. If Blade Dance is on cooldown, your ailments are 20% weaker on unlinked targets.
nodes.antiSynergyNotes: Pack Hunter (T3a Predator) — per-enemy damage bonus partially offset by -30% direct damage.
nodes.synergyNotes: Plague Link (T2) is the foundation T7 amplifies. Plague Web (T4) becomes even stronger with all-target linking. Pandemic Dance (T6) spreads 3x ailments on linked kills.

mechanics: Scattered Threat (T1a — pack-size DR, defense weakens as pack shrinks, unique to AoE)
Defensive Scatter (T2 notable — dodge after Blade Dance grants Fortify + counter-hits each target)
Phantom Dance (T6 notable — dodge triggers a free Blade Dance counter that prioritizes attackers)
nonTracked: +X% DR per unique target hit — T3 conditional, no tracking
Defensive Scatter extension — T4b support, enhances tracked state

comboModifications.description: Dance Momentum replaced with Evasive Dance: +15% dodge chance for 3s.

nodes.name: Scattered Threat
nodes.description: While 3+ enemies are alive in the current encounter, you take 8% less damage. Each enemy killed by Blade Dance reduces this bonus by 2% (defense weakens as the pack shrinks).
nodes.rank2: 10% DR at 3+ enemies. Reduction per kill lowered to 1.5%. Also gain +5 all resist while 3+ enemies alive.
nodes.designNotes: Defense from PACK SIZE — completely different from Stab's per-hit dodge stacking. BD is strong when surrounded (natural environment) and weakens as you clear. Creates tension: killing fast reduces your own defense. Can't exist on single-target skills.

nodes.name: Dancing Recovery
nodes.description: Each unique target hit by Blade Dance heals for 1% max HP. (3 targets = 3% HP).
nodes.rank2: 1.5% per target (4.5% at 3). If all 3 targets are hit, also gain +1 Fortify stack.
nodes.designNotes: Per-target healing. More targets = more healing. Different from Stab's Combat Leech (% of damage dealt as leech). This is flat max HP healing scaled by target count.

nodes.name: Defensive Scatter
nodes.description: If you dodge within 3s of casting Blade Dance: each target that was hit takes a counter-hit for 60% of Blade Dance's fully-scaled damage and you gain +1 Fortify stack per target hit (max 3). 5s internal cooldown. +5 all resist.
nodes.designNotes: Dodge after BD → counter ALL targets that were hit + Fortify per target. 3 targets = 3 Fortify stacks in one dodge. Different from Stab's Shadow Guard (dodge → single counter). This is MULTI-TARGET counter-attack.

nodes.name: Scattering Steps
nodes.description: After casting Blade Dance on 3 targets: +10% chance to dodge the next attack.
nodes.rank2: +15% dodge. Also, dodging within 2s of BD reduces BD's cooldown by 1s.
nodes.designNotes: Post-cast dodge bonus. Rank 2's CD reduction on dodge creates a BD → dodge → faster BD loop.

nodes.name: Scattered Defense
nodes.description: +5% damage reduction for 3s per unique target hit by the most recent Blade Dance (max +15% at 3 targets).
nodes.rank2: +8% per target (max +24%). +3% weapon mastery.
nodes.designNotes: DR scaling from target diversity. Pack = strong defense, boss = weak. Natural fit for the sequential-target mechanic.

nodes.name: Evasive Dance
nodes.description: Dance Momentum replaced with Evasive Dance (3s): +15% dodge chance.
nodes.rank2: +20% dodge chance. Duration extended to 4s.
nodes.designNotes: COMBO MODIFICATION. Instead of splash damage on next skill, BD creates a dodge window. Ghost identity — defense over offense from combo states.

nodes.name: Retaliation Marks
nodes.description: Each enemy hit by Blade Dance that attacks you within 3s becomes Marked for Retaliation: takes +15% more damage from your next Blade Dance.
nodes.rank2: +20% more damage. Marks last 5s instead of 3s. Marked enemies also take +5% damage from all your other skills.
nodes.designNotes: Offense-from-defense via ENEMY DEBUFF, not self-buff. Completely different from Stab's Counter Momentum (self +dmg after dodge). This puts a mark on enemies that HIT YOU after being hit by BD — they become more vulnerable to the next BD. Rewards being in the thick of a pack.

nodes.name: Evasive Dance Form
nodes.description: When you dodge 2 attacks within 4s of casting Blade Dance: enter Evasive Dance Form (4s). During form: Blade Dance cooldown reduced by 50% and all Blade Dance hits apply Weakened curse (2s). 10s internal cooldown. +5% weapon mastery.
nodes.designNotes: State-shift on dodge-after-BD. Different from Stab's Shadow Form (DR + Weakened) because this gives CD reduction on BD itself — allowing rapid BD casts during the window. Weakened on all targets makes BD a debuff spreader during the form.

nodes.name: Form Persistence
nodes.description: While Evasive Dance Form is active: +10% dodge chance.
nodes.rank2: +15% dodge chance. Each Blade Dance cast during form extends it by 0.5s (max +2s).
nodes.designNotes: Support for Evasive Dance Form. More dodge = more form triggers. BD casts extend the form. Self-reinforcing loop.

nodes.name: Iron Dancer
nodes.description: Each Blade Dance cast grants +1 Fortify stack (3% DR, 6s). At 3+ Fortify stacks: Blade Dance heals 2% max HP per target hit. +8% weapon mastery.
nodes.designNotes: Consistent sustain. Fortify per cast + healing per target at threshold. 3 targets × 2% = 6% HP healed per BD cast at 3+ Fortify. Reliable survival.

nodes.name: Counter Dancer
nodes.description: Defensive Scatter counter-hits (T2) deal 120% instead of 60% and can crit. Each counter-hit that crits reduces Blade Dance cooldown by 0.5s. You take +10% increased damage from all sources.
nodes.designNotes: Risky offense-from-defense. Counter-hits become your damage source — doubled damage, can crit, crits reduce BD CD. But +10% damage taken. High risk, high reward.

nodes.name: Phantom Dance
nodes.description: When you dodge: 20% chance to trigger Phantom Dance — a free Blade Dance counter-attack that prioritizes enemies currently attacking you. Each hit deals 80% of Blade Dance's fully-scaled damage. 8s internal cooldown. +5% weapon mastery.
nodes.designNotes: Catastrophic dodge proc — free Blade Dance counter that targets YOUR attackers. Different from Stab's Phantom Strike (single 200% counter). This is a multi-target counter that hits up to 3 enemies attacking you. Defensive targeting = hits the threats.

nodes.name: SHADOW DANCER
nodes.description: Phantom Dance (T6) triggers on EVERY dodge (no chance roll, no ICD). Counter-hits deal 50% instead of 80%. Each Phantom Dance trigger costs 1.5% max HP. Blade Dance's regular casts deal -15% damage.
nodes.tensionDescription: T6 (Phantom Dance) is a rare 20% proc with 8s ICD. T7 makes it fire EVERY dodge — constant multi-target counters. But each hit is weaker (50% vs 80%), triggers cost HP, and regular BD casts are nerfed. You become a reactive dancer who damages by dodging, not by casting.
nodes.antiSynergyNotes: Dancing Recovery (T1b) — per-target healing can't keep up with 1.5% HP drain per dodge if dodging frequently.
nodes.synergyNotes: Scattered Threat (T1a) — pack DR keeps you alive while constant Phantom Dance triggers drain HP. Counter Dancer (T5B) — counters deal 120% + crit. Phantom Dance (T6) — T7 removes chance and ICD.
